subject: [PATCH 2/6 v3] mm/page_counter: use page_counter_stock in page_counter_try_charge

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch modifies the page_counter_try_charge function to use the page_counter_stock feature when available. It first checks if there is enough stock to fulfill the charge request, and if so, charges the stock directly without attempting a hierarchical charge. If there is not enough stock, it attempts a greedy hierarchical charge and then tries to add any surplus pages to the stock. The patch preserves the existing semantics of the stock handling logic in try_charge_memcg.
